sentence: The attacker used klist.exe to list cached Kerberos tickets from the target system.
Malware executed klist to enumerate available Kerberos service tickets in memory.
The threat actor ran klist.exe to identify cached TGT tickets for potential extraction.
The adversary used klist.exe to view Kerberos ticket expiration times and session keys.
Malicious code executed klist with the purge option to clear cached Kerberos tickets after extraction.
